manifest_release_notes: Watch Party got dedicated collaborative screens, backend-powered AniList discovery/alerts, and API-driven release delivery.

summary.es: Watch Party gano pantallas colaborativas dedicadas, descubrimiento/alertas impulsadas por backend y una distribucion de releases mas solida por API.
summary.en: Watch Party got dedicated collaborative screens, backend-powered discovery/alerts, and a more reliable API-driven release flow.
